title: Susmit Pushkar leaves Khaitan & Co to set up independent practice
description: Khaitan & Co Disputes Partner Susmit Pushkar has resigned from the firm to set up his own independent practice.Confirming his exit, Khaitan Executive Director Amar Sinhji said,“Susmit is moving on to set up an independent practice. He has contributed immensely to the growth of our Disputes Practice and we wish him all the very best in his future endeavours.”Pushkar is a 2004 alumnus of National Law Institute University, Bhopal.
